name: Pimcore Open-Source PIM & DXP API
what_it_does: Pimcore REST API for open-source PIM, MDM, DAM, CDP, and DXP platform. Enables AI agents to manage product and object data models and attributes, handle digital asset and media management workflows, access e-commerce product catalog and variant data, retrieve customer and master data management records, manage content management and web page workflows, handle data quality and validation rules, access translation and localization management, retrieve workflow and approval process data, manage classification system and taxonomy, and integrate product and content data with e-commerce, ERP, and marketing systems.
use_cases: Managing product data and digital assets from catalog automation agents
Handling product enrichment and localization from content automation agents
Accessing e-commerce catalog and variant data from commerce automation agents
Integrating PIM data with ERP and marketing from data pipeline agents
not_for: SaaS-first teams without on-premises or self-hosted deployment capability
Simple CMS without enterprise PIM and MDM complexity
Small teams without PHP/Symfony development expertise
best_when: A manufacturer, retailer, or enterprise with self-hosted Pimcore wants AI agents to automate product data management, digital asset workflows, content publishing, e-commerce catalog sync, and ERP integration.
avoid_when: OPERATIONAL: Pimcore is self-hosted open source — API availability depends on customer's own server infrastructure. Data model is customer-defined — agents must understand the specific implementation's data model. Automated product data changes that publish to e-commerce require staging and review workflows.

auth.notes: Pimcore uses API keys and OAuth 2.0 for REST and GraphQL API access. Admin user and service account credentials. Self-hosted deployment means auth configuration varies by customer. Webhooks for data change events. GraphQL API available for flexible data querying. PHP/Symfony-based platform.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Pimcore Community Edition: fully open source (OSL-3.0 license)
pricing.paid_tiers: Pimcore Platform Edition: enterprise support, SLA, managed cloud hosting
pricing.notes: Wels, Austria. Founded 2010. Open-source PIM/MDM/DAM/DXP platform. 110,000+ community users. 1,000+ enterprise implementations. OSL-3.0 open source with commercial enterprise licensing. Platform Edition adds managed cloud hosting and SLA. Competes with Akeneo for open-source PIM. Used by Audi, Porsche, and BMW for product data.

performance.rate_limits: Self-hosted: no API rate limits by default; customer infrastructure dependent

known_agent_gotchas: OPERATIONAL: Self-hosted deployment — API availability and performance depends on customer's own infrastructure
Data model is customer-defined — agents need implementation-specific schema documentation before use
No public MCP server — REST and GraphQL API with community documentation
TLS enforcement depends on customer's Nginx/Apache configuration — not guaranteed at platform level
Open source means no SLA unless commercial Platform Edition — reliability varies by deployment
GraphQL API is available alongside REST — prefer GraphQL for complex data queries to reduce round-trips
agent_readiness.security_notes: Self-hosted PIM and content data. GDPR. OAuth2. Self-hosted infrastructure. Data security depends on customer's deployment configuration.

security_score_components.security_notes: PIM and content data. GDPR. OAuth2. Self-hosted. Security quality depends on customer deployment configuration.
